    Connect with Us!

    Lima City Schools

    The Lima City Schools is committed to its mission to create a climate in which every student learns. We pride ourselves in fostering a caring and inclusive environment where every student can find his or her niche and be successful. We believe in our students, our staff, our families and our community.
